error_locked: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.
error_locked_countdown: Account temporarily locked. Try again in {{time}}.
error_service: The service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
error_2fa: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
error_2fa_expired: Verification session expired. Please sign in again.
remaining_attempts: {{count}} attempt(s) remaining before your account is temporarily locked.
prompt_2fa: Enter the 6-digit code from your authentication app.
title: Login
recovery_instructions: Enter your username or email and we'll send you a recovery code.
recovery_code_sent: A recovery code has been sent if that account exists. Check your inbox.
recovery_success: Password reset successfully. You can now sign in.
recovery_error_too_many: Too many attempts. Please request a new recovery code.
recovery_error_expired_token: The reset session expired. Please start again.
recovery_error_weak_password: Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, number, and symbol.
recovery_error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
